output_dir.description: Directory under workspace_root for report files

output_formats.description: Report formats to generate: json, csv, pdf, xlsx (Excel with FRONTPAGE, SAST, SCA, LICENSES sheets)

dependencies.description: Enable dependency analysis (Syft + Grype) and include in reports (vulns, SBOM, section 2, SCA/LICENSES sheets)

infra.description: Enable infra discovery and analysis (Dockerfile, compose, K8s, Trivy) and include in reports (section 3, INFRA sheet, panorama-infra.*)

licenses.description: Enable license extraction and include licenses section/sheets in reports (section 4, LICENSES sheet)

include_vulns.description: Include vulnerabilities in all report formats

min_severity.description: Minimum severity to include in reports

ecosystems.description: Only include these ecosystems (e.g. npm, PyPI). Empty = all

denied_licenses.description: License identifiers to flag as policy violations

pdf_template.description: Path to Markdown template for PDF (default: plugin templates/panorama-report.md)

pdf_template_css.description: Path to CSS for PDF template (default: plugin templates/panorama-report.css)

syft_path.description: Path to Syft binary (SBOM). Empty = plugin-local bin/syft

grype_path.description: Path to Grype binary. Empty = plugin-local bin/grype

scan_images.description: Scan container images for CVEs via Trivy (Dockerfile/compose/K8s). Requires trivy in PATH.

trivy_path.description: Path to Trivy binary. Empty = plugin-local bin/trivy

trivy_timeout_sec.description: Timeout per image for Trivy scan (seconds)

check_healthcheck.description: Emit finding when Dockerfile has no HEALTHCHECK
